payload.answer: Saved the user-provided article URL and stated reason, but the article content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL could not be fetched, so no article metadata or content-derived entity can be resolved.

memory_cards.statement: The user wants to remember the article at https://example.com/missing because it may be useful for memory architecture.

details: Committed only the URL and the user-stated reason.
Did not extract article claims because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.

repair_options: Ask the user to provide the article title or text.
Ask the user for an alternate URL.
